breakdown.creativeCore: 3D Cinematic Multi-Panel Promo Poster：A multi-panel promotional poster featuring 3D caricature characters with dramatic backgrounds and customizable Japanese typography.
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.bestUse: 电影海报、音乐封面、书籍封面、播客封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: close-up, wide shot]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: cinematic, 3d]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: dramatic lighting]。

Text requirements:
文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
